title: AFK-Preventer
description: Prevents AFK kicks by randomly pressing movement keys (W/A/S/D/Space) every 20-40 seconds while you are in-game.
body:
## ⌨️ AFK Preventer, Stay online, stay safe.
![Enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e789d5c86f326c3314fdbd772af66d30a90a3a5c.jpeg) 

![Disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/627c0af1fd12341b4a117f0009aa12c9d17488cd.jpeg)


🎲 How does it work?

First you press your key to activate it **_(default key is G but you can change it in Options →Controls)_** Every 20–40 seconds, it randomly presses one of your movement keys (W / A / S / D / Space) for a split second — just enough to reset the AFK timer without disturbing you.

🔧 What does it do?

Tired of getting kicked for being AFK? AFK Preventer silently runs in the background and keeps you in the game — no babysitting required.


✅ Features

🔇 Completely silent — no chat messages, no notifications
⚡ Lightweight — zero performance impact
🎮 Client-side only — works on any server
🔀 Fully random — timing and key selection are randomized every time

📦 Requirements for versions

AFK Preventer AUTO-X2:

Minecraft 1.21+
Fabric Loader
Fabric API

AFK Preventer AUTO-X1:

Minecraft 1.21+
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
